internal/source/hackernews/hn.go.one_line: HackerNews source with concurrent fetching, ID-based checkpoints, item filtering

internal/source/hackernews/hn_test.go.one_line: Test suite for HNSource with mock Firebase API server

internal/source/reddit/reddit.go.one_line: Reddit source with timestamp-based checkpoints, rate limit handling, User-Agent requirement

internal/source/reddit/reddit_test.go.one_line: Comprehensive test suite for RedditSource with mocked HTTP server, checkpoint filtering, error scenarios

internal/source/registry.go.one_line: Registry struct for managing and querying registered Source implementations by name and type

internal/source/registry_test.go.one_line: Test suite for Registry with mockSource test double, covering add/list/lookup/remove and duplicate-name replacement

internal/source/source.go.one_line: Source interface and SourceMessage type - core abstraction for all content sources

internal/source/rss/rss.go.one_line: RSSSource implementation with HTTP conditional requests, ETag/Last-Modified caching, gofeed parsing

internal/source/rss/rss_test.go.one_line: Test suite for RSSSource covering RSS 2.0, Atom feeds, HTTP caching, checkpoint filtering, error handling

internal/source/telegram/telegram.go.one_line: TelegramSource adapter wrapping refresh.Fetcher with message ID-based checkpoints

internal/source/telegram/telegram_test.g.one_line: Test suite for TelegramSource covering Type, Name, FetchMessages with checkpoints, errors, and invalid inputs
